hooks.description: Print branch, recent commits, state health
Detect stale indexes, missing state, propagation drift
Verify all changes are committed before compaction
Save working context snapshot before compaction
Remind to restore session context after compaction
Non-blocking quality reminders after tool use
Detect stale indexes, missing state, propagation drift
Auto-refresh workflow DAG diagram if source files changed
Log subagent completion to audit trail

description: Hook configuration for agentic-workflows hub. Hooks fire on tool events to enforce quality, safety, and state management.
notes: The quality gate runs as a pre-commit check via checkpoint-commit.sh (wired into the script directly).
These hooks provide additional event-based enforcement for non-commit events (compaction, tool use).
Hooks are implemented as bash scripts in scripts/hooks/ for simplicity and cross-platform compatibility.
OpenCode does not natively fire all hook lifecycle events --- hooks.json serves as Claude Code compatibility layer.
In OpenCode, session-start and detect-gaps are invoked via AGENTS.md startup instructions.
Audit logging is wired into subagent task prompts in opencode.jsonc.
